name: Skullcrusher (Lying Triceps Extension)
resistance_profile: Elbow extension with the arms back, giving the long head some stretch.
cues: Lower to the forehead/behind the head
Keep the upper arms angled back
execution_steps: Lie on a flat bench holding an EZ-bar or barbell over your chest with arms extended.
Angle the upper arms slightly back toward your head rather than straight up.
Bend the elbows to lower the bar toward your forehead or just behind your head.
Extend the elbows back to lockout without flaring or turning it into a press.
good_when: You want a free-weight triceps builder with a stretch on the long head.
Adding elbow-flexed stretch loading alongside pushdowns.
You prefer barbell or EZ-bar work over cables.
bad_when: Your elbows are sensitive to the lower-to-forehead position.
You want constant tension, since a cable holds tension better near lockout.
You want a fuller overhead long-head stretch (use an overhead extension).
